textPlain: AWS specifically have really dropped the ball on this.I interact regularly with AWS to support our needs in MLOps and to some extent GenAI. 3 of the experts we talked to have all left for competitors in the last year.re:Invent London this year presented nothing new of note on the GenAI front. The year before was full of promise on Bedrock.Outside of AWS, I still can’t fathom how they haven’t integrated an AI assistant into Alexa yet either
